caption_text: DAG · one key routes to three frontier labs, two share the cache, telemetry skips the ranks to metrics
caption_text_amended: DAG · one key routes to three frontier labs, every lab shares the cache, telemetry skips the ranks to metrics

cards.dims_superseded: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: hand-file width citations are ceilings — cards solve to their own ink + anchor pads; the hand file's wider cards are dress history

census_amendments.note: corrected serving topology (pp-gateway-balanced.svg: providers feed the shared cache; observability rides the telemetry line alone) — gemini's metrics arrow becomes a third cache convergent: one fewer arrow terminal, one more particle rider
